name: ai-playwright-juice-shop
description: BDD Playwright framework for OWASP Juice Shop with AI-assisted QA capabilities

scripts.test:all: npm run bdd:gen && npx playwright test
scripts.test:ui: npm run bdd:gen && npx playwright test --project=ui
scripts.test:ui:headed: npm run bdd:gen && npx playwright test --project=ui --headed
scripts.test:ui:debug: npm run bdd:gen && npx playwright test --project=ui --debug
scripts.test:all:docker: npm run docker:up && npm run app:wait && npm run test:all ; npm run docker:down
scripts.test:ui:docker: npm run docker:up && npm run app:wait && npm run test:ui ; npm run docker:down
scripts.test:ui:headed:docker: npm run docker:up && npm run app:wait && npm run test:ui:headed ; npm run docker:down
scripts.test:ui:debug:docker: npm run docker:up && npm run app:wait && npm run test:ui:debug ; npm run docker:down
scripts.test:api:docker: npm run docker:up && npm run app:wait && npm run test:api ; npm run docker:down
